summary.en: Verge Genomics uses human genomic data and AI to develop better drugs faster.
summary.zh: Verge Genomics 運用人體基因組數據與 AI,更快地開發更好的藥物。

highlight.en: Verge runs an end-to-end drug discovery platform built on one of the field's largest proprietary patient genomics datasets, mined with machine learning.
highlight.zh: Verge 打造端到端的藥物發現平台,建立在業界最大的專有病患基因組數據集之一,並以機器學習進行挖掘。

summary.en: Eden offers workplace software for people-centric companies.
summary.zh: Eden 為重視員工的公司提供職場管理軟體。

highlight.en: Eden's suite bundles workplace operations tools such as desk booking, room scheduling, and visitor management for modern offices.
highlight.zh: Eden 的工具組整合了辦公桌預約、會議室排程與訪客管理等現代辦公室營運功能。

summary.en: Reach Labs builds long-range wireless power networks that scale.
summary.zh: Reach Labs 打造可規模化的長距離無線能源傳輸網路。

highlight.en: Reach Labs is developing long-range wireless power infrastructure aimed at delivering scalable and resilient energy distribution.
highlight.zh: Reach Labs 正在開發長距離無線供電基礎設施,目標是提供可規模化且具韌性的能源傳輸。

summary.en: Gemnote is the easiest way to design, create, and send custom branded products.
summary.zh: Gemnote 是設計、製作與寄送客製化品牌產品最簡單的方式。

highlight.en: Gemnote's full-service platform curates, sources, warehouses, and ships custom company swag for clients including Airbnb, Google, and Slack.
highlight.zh: Gemnote 的全方位服務平台為 Airbnb、Google、Slack 等客戶策劃、採購、倉儲並寄送客製化公司贈品。

summary.en: ROSS Intelligence was an AI-powered legal research platform for lawyers.
summary.zh: ROSS Intelligence 是一個以 AI 驅動、供律師使用的法律研究平台。

highlight.en: Founded by computer scientists and an attorney, ROSS targeted the $8B legal research market, claiming lawyers could research in 80% less time.
highlight.zh: 由電腦科學家與一位律師創立,ROSS 鎖定 80 億美元的法律研究市場,聲稱可讓律師研究時間縮短 80%。

summary.en: The Ticket Fairy is a ticketing and revenue acceleration platform for live events.
summary.zh: The Ticket Fairy 是為現場活動打造的售票與營收加速平台。

highlight.en: The Ticket Fairy combines ticketing, marketing, management, and analytics to help event promoters across the US, UK, Australia, and India lift revenue.
highlight.zh: The Ticket Fairy 整合售票、行銷、管理與分析,協助美國、英國、澳洲、印度等市場的活動主辦方提升營收。

summary.en: Fetch was a marketplace for instant, self-service truck rental via your phone.
summary.zh: Fetch 是一個透過手機即時自助租用卡車的市集。

highlight.en: Fetch let users book and unlock a nearby truck instantly with their smartphone, skipping rental-counter lines at a lower price.
highlight.zh: Fetch 讓使用者以智慧型手機即時預約並解鎖附近的卡車,跳過租車櫃台排隊,且價格更低。

summary.en: SnapMagic provides AI-assisted electronics design tools for engineers.
summary.zh: SnapMagic 為工程師提供 AI 輔助的電子設計工具。

highlight.en: Built by electrical engineers, SnapMagic's electronic component data is used by over 2 million engineers, and its AI design tool removes design monotony.
highlight.zh: 由電機工程師打造,SnapMagic 的電子元件數據被超過 200 萬名工程師使用,其 AI 設計工具消除設計中的繁瑣工作。

summary.en: Heroic Labs builds social and multiplayer infrastructure for games.
summary.zh: Heroic Labs 為遊戲打造社交與多人連線基礎設施。

highlight.en: Heroic Labs makes the Heroic Game Stack—Nakama, Hiro, Satori, and Heroic Cloud—so studios can build social and multiplayer games at massive scale.
highlight.zh: Heroic Labs 打造 Heroic Game Stack(Nakama、Hiro、Satori 與 Heroic Cloud),讓遊戲工作室能開發可大規模運作的社交與多人遊戲。

summary.en: New Story pioneers solutions to end the global housing crisis.
summary.zh: New Story 開創解決方案,致力終結全球住房危機。

highlight.en: New Story has raised over $80 million to build thousands of homes across Latin America, and in 2021 launched the housing-innovation fund Hometeam Ventures.
highlight.zh: New Story 已募資超過 8,000 萬美元,在拉丁美洲興建數千棟房屋,並於 2021 年成立住房創新基金 Hometeam Ventures。

summary.en: Bodyport builds technology to predict and prevent heart disease.
summary.zh: Bodyport 打造預測與預防心臟疾病的技術。

highlight.en: Bodyport's cardiovascular sensing scale measures cardiac output and congestion in one step, targeting heart failure to prevent avoidable hospitalizations.
highlight.zh: Bodyport 的心血管感測體重計在單一步驟中測量心輸出量與充血狀態,鎖定心臟衰竭以預防可避免的住院。

summary.en: Confident LIMS is a SaaS lab information management system for regulated industries.
summary.zh: Confident LIMS 是為受監管產業打造的 SaaS 實驗室資訊管理系統。

highlight.en: Confident LIMS serves over 60% of the US legal cannabis industry and is expanding into agriculture, food and beverage, and environmental testing labs.
highlight.zh: Confident LIMS 服務超過六成的美國合法大麻產業,並正擴展至農業、食品飲料與環境檢測實驗室。

summary.en: Font Awesome provides icons and social logos for websites with one line of code.
summary.zh: Font Awesome 只需一行程式碼,即可為網站提供圖示與社群標誌。

highlight.en: Font Awesome lets developers add thousands of icons and social logos to a site instantly by dropping in a single line of code.
highlight.zh: Font Awesome 讓開發者只要嵌入一行程式碼,就能即時為網站加入數千個圖示與社群標誌。

summary.en: Nebia is a breakthrough shower system focused on a premium, water-saving experience.
summary.zh: Nebia 是一套突破性的淋浴系統,專注於高端且節水的體驗。

highlight.en: The Nebia shower delivers up to 70% water savings versus traditional showers without compromising experience; it was acquired by Brondell in 2022.
highlight.zh: Nebia 淋浴系統相較傳統淋浴可節水達 70%,且不犧牲體驗;該公司於 2022 年被 Brondell 收購。

summary.en: Branch8 helps online sellers list and manage products across e-commerce sites.
summary.zh: Branch8 協助網路賣家在各大電商平台上架與管理商品。

highlight.en: Branch8 is a one-stop platform for cross-listing, logistics, and order management, built by a team of former top sellers on Lazada, Amazon, and eBay.
highlight.zh: Branch8 是一站式平台,提供跨平台上架、物流與訂單管理,由曾在 Lazada、Amazon 與 eBay 的頂尖賣家團隊打造。

summary.en: SunFarmer provides reliable, affordable solar energy in developing countries.
summary.zh: SunFarmer 在開發中國家提供可靠且平價的太陽能。

highlight.en: SunFarmer delivers affordable solar power to hospitals, schools, businesses, and farms in regions where electricity is unstable or extremely expensive.
highlight.zh: SunFarmer 為電力不穩或極度昂貴地區的醫院、學校、企業與農場提供平價太陽能。

summary.en: Tenant Turner helps residential property managers eliminate vacancy.
summary.zh: Tenant Turner 協助住宅物業管理者消除空置。

highlight.en: Tenant Turner streamlines renting from leads to lease, listing on major sites, pre-qualifying prospects, and scheduling showings via agent or lockbox.
highlight.zh: Tenant Turner 從招租到簽約全程簡化,於各大平台刊登、預先篩選潛在租客,並透過經紀人或密碼鎖安排看屋。

summary.en: 80,000 Hours is an online guide helping talented graduates maximize their career impact.
summary.zh: 80,000 Hours 是一份線上指南,協助優秀畢業生最大化其職涯影響力。

highlight.en: 80,000 Hours provides research, an online guide, and one-on-one advice plus introductions to help graduates make a big positive impact with their careers.
highlight.zh: 80,000 Hours 提供研究、線上指南、一對一諮詢與引薦,協助畢業生善用職涯創造重大正面影響。

summary.en: Cofactor Genomics closes the precision medicine gap with predictive diagnostics.
summary.zh: Cofactor Genomics 以預測性診斷彌合精準醫療的落差。

highlight.en: Cofactor uses RNA and Predictive Immune Modeling on terabytes of data, with a peer-reviewed study showing superiority in predicting immunotherapy responders.
highlight.zh: Cofactor 以 RNA 與預測性免疫建模分析數 TB 數據,並有同儕審查研究顯示其在預測免疫療法反應者上更具優勢。

summary.en: Assembly offers manufacturing and distribution quality solutions for China-based production.
summary.zh: Assembly 為中國產線提供製造與配送品質解決方案。

highlight.en: Assembly installs cameras and remote monitoring on factory lines to ensure quality compliance and create an audit trail, charging per unit with revenue share.
highlight.zh: Assembly 在工廠產線安裝攝影機與遠端監控,確保品質合規並建立稽核軌跡,採每件計費並與工廠分潤。

summary.en: Hickory was a training tool that turned employees into brand experts.
summary.zh: Hickory 是一款將員工培養為品牌專家的訓練工具。

highlight.en: Hickory focused on retention, predicting when a sales or support rep would forget what they learned and scheduling tailored review exercises to prevent it.
highlight.zh: Hickory 專注於記憶留存,預測業務或客服人員何時會忘記所學,並安排量身訂製的複習練習以防止遺忘。

summary.en: Cymmetria was a cybersecurity company specializing in deception technology.
summary.zh: Cymmetria 是一家專精於誘捕技術的網路安全公司。

highlight.en: Cymmetria's MazeRunner and ActiveSOC let organizations hunt attackers and detect lateral movement, with its tech credited with catching five nation-state APTs.
highlight.zh: Cymmetria 的 MazeRunner 與 ActiveSOC 讓組織能獵捕攻擊者並偵測橫向移動,其技術據稱已捕捉五個國家級 APT。

summary.en: Afrostream was a streaming service for African-American and African content.
summary.zh: Afrostream 是一個串流非裔美國人與非洲內容的影音服務。

highlight.en: Afrostream offered 1,000+ hours of premium content licensed from Warner Brothers, Sony, and Lionsgate, reaching over 12 million European households.
highlight.zh: Afrostream 提供超過 1,000 小時的精選內容,授權自華納兄弟、Sony 與 Lionsgate,並觸及超過 1,200 萬個歐洲家庭。

summary.en: Locent was an automated messaging platform for companies.
summary.zh: Locent 是一個為企業打造的自動化訊息平台。

highlight.en: Locent provided companies with a platform to automate their customer and business messaging.
highlight.zh: Locent 為企業提供平台,自動化其客戶與商務訊息傳送。

summary.en: Blitz Esports broke down the world of esports and offered educational content.
summary.zh: Blitz Esports 解析電競世界並提供教學內容。

highlight.en: Blitz built the first fully automatic League of Legends coaching app, using computer vision and data to help gamers across over a million games each week.
highlight.zh: Blitz 打造首款全自動的《英雄聯盟》教練應用,運用電腦視覺與數據,每週協助玩家在超過一百萬場對局中做決策。

summary.en: Wheelys Café is a bike-powered organic café franchise for aspiring entrepreneurs.
summary.zh: Wheelys Café 是一個以單車為動力的有機咖啡連鎖加盟,專為有志創業者打造。

highlight.en: Wheelys lets people without much money open their own café, selling over 800 organic bicycle cafés across 75 countries within its first year.
highlight.zh: Wheelys 讓資金有限的人也能開設自己的咖啡店,創業首年即在 75 個國家售出超過 800 間有機單車咖啡店。

summary.en: StyleBee was a marketplace for on-demand beauty services delivered anywhere.
summary.zh: StyleBee 是一個隨時隨地提供美容服務的隨選市集。

highlight.en: StyleBee connected clients with vetted beauty professionals for hair and make-up services delivered at their convenience, anywhere and any time.
highlight.zh: StyleBee 將客戶與經嚴格篩選的美容專業人員媒合,隨時隨地提供便利的美髮與化妝服務。

summary.en: PlateJoy builds technology to power disease prevention through personalized nutrition.
summary.zh: PlateJoy 打造技術,以個人化營養推動疾病預防。

highlight.en: PlateJoy uses 50 data points about how you eat and live to build custom meal plans, and runs a digital Diabetes Prevention Program free to 60M+ insured lives.
highlight.zh: PlateJoy 透過 50 項飲食與生活數據生成客製化餐單,並提供數位糖尿病預防計畫,免費供逾 6,000 萬名受保人使用。

summary.en: Vive was a beauty concierge offering salon appointments and unlimited blowouts.
summary.zh: Vive 是一個美容禮賓服務,提供沙龍預約與無限次吹整。

highlight.en: Vive booked top salon appointments in two taps and let members enjoy unlimited blowouts at salons in its network, replacing searching and calling around.
highlight.zh: Vive 只需兩個點擊即可預約頂級沙龍,讓會員在其合作沙龍網路享受無限次吹整,免去搜尋與致電的麻煩。

summary.en: Flirtey is a commercial drone delivery service for last-mile delivery.
summary.zh: Flirtey 是一個用於最後一哩配送的商用無人機送貨服務。

highlight.en: Flirtey operates a network of delivery drones and achieved industry firsts, including a US partnership to launch automated AED defibrillator drone delivery.
highlight.zh: Flirtey 營運送貨無人機網路,並締造多項業界首例,包括在美國合作推出自動化 AED 去顫器無人機配送。

summary.en: Foxpass makes enterprise security practices available to all companies.
summary.zh: Foxpass 讓所有公司都能採用企業級安全做法。

highlight.en: Foxpass uses cloud-hosted LDAP and RADIUS, backed by existing Google Apps accounts, to ensure employee accounts only have the access they need.
highlight.zh: Foxpass 運用雲端託管的 LDAP 與 RADIUS,並串接既有的 Google Apps 帳號,確保員工帳號僅擁有所需的存取權限。

summary.en: Willing is the easiest way to make your legal will without a lawyer.
summary.zh: Willing 是不必找律師就能立合法遺囑的最簡單方式。

highlight.en: Willing creates legal documents to name guardians and transfer assets from simple questions; it was acquired by MetLife to power its legal insurance.
highlight.zh: Willing 透過簡單問答即可生成指定監護人與轉移資產的法律文件;該公司被 MetLife 收購,為其法律保險提供技術。

summary.en: Microhealth develops digital therapeutics for hematology and oncology.
summary.zh: Microhealth 開發血液學與腫瘤學領域的數位療法。

highlight.en: Microhealth's hemophilia network covers 33% of US patients and providers, and its clients include Sanofi, Bayer, Novo Nordisk, Biogen, and Roche.
highlight.zh: Microhealth 的血友病網路涵蓋全美三分之一的病患與醫療提供者,客戶包括 Sanofi、Bayer、Novo Nordisk、Biogen 與 Roche。

summary.en: HER helps lesbian, bisexual, and queer people meet each other.
summary.zh: HER 協助女同志、雙性戀與酷兒族群相互結識。

highlight.en: HER is a dating and community app for LGBTQ+ people that also hosts in-person events in 12 cities worldwide, typically drawing 300–600 attendees per party.
highlight.zh: HER 是為 LGBTQ+ 族群打造的交友與社群應用,並在全球 12 個城市舉辦實體活動,派對通常吸引 300 至 600 名參與者。

summary.en: Thrive Agritech designs and manufactures energy-efficient LED lighting for indoor agriculture.
summary.zh: Thrive Agritech 設計並製造用於室內農業的節能 LED 照明。

highlight.en: Thrive's patent-pending LED systems precisely target photosynthetic spectrums and are installed in leading vertical farms, greenhouses, and cannabis facilities.
highlight.zh: Thrive 的專利申請中 LED 系統可精準鎖定光合作用光譜,已安裝於領先的垂直農場、溫室與大麻設施。

summary.en: Mimir is a platform for STEM courses with automated grading and plagiarism detection.
summary.zh: Mimir 是一個提供自動評分與抄襲偵測的 STEM 課程平台。

highlight.en: Mimir Classroom is deployed in over 70 universities, helping computer science instructors teach more effectively via automated grading and plagiarism checks.
highlight.zh: Mimir Classroom 已部署於超過 70 所大學,透過自動評分與抄襲檢查協助電腦科學教師更有效率地授課。

summary.en: VOIQ provides conversational AI VoiceBots for business sales and marketing.
summary.zh: VOIQ 為企業的銷售與行銷提供對話式 AI 語音機器人。

highlight.en: VOIQ lets businesses leverage AI conversational VoiceBots to handle sales and marketing calls.
highlight.zh: VOIQ 讓企業運用對話式 AI 語音機器人處理銷售與行銷的通話。

summary.en: ShapeScale is a personal 3D scanner and fitness tracker.
summary.zh: ShapeScale 是一款個人 3D 掃描器與健身追蹤器。

highlight.en: ShapeScale lets users visualize themselves in 3D to see exactly where they are losing fat and gaining muscle, reinventing how health goals are measured.
highlight.zh: ShapeScale 讓使用者以 3D 視覺化自己的身體,精確看出減脂與增肌的部位,重新定義健康目標的衡量方式。

summary.en: SourceDNA brings transparency to app stores and helps developers build better apps.
summary.zh: SourceDNA 為應用程式商店帶來透明度,並協助開發者打造更好的應用。

highlight.en: SourceDNA's patent-pending similarity engine scans iOS and Android apps to reveal code quality, origin, and intent, matching variants across platforms.
highlight.zh: SourceDNA 的專利申請中相似度引擎可掃描 iOS 與 Android 應用,揭示程式碼品質、來源與意圖,並跨平台比對變體。

summary.en: Markhor is a DTC brand working with craftsmen to make handcrafted shoes and accessories.
summary.zh: Markhor 是一個直接面向消費者的品牌,與工匠合作製作手工鞋履與配件。

highlight.en: Markhor's leather footwear and accessories are handcrafted by some of the most skilled artisans in the subcontinent.
highlight.zh: Markhor 的皮革鞋履與配件由南亞次大陸最頂尖的工匠手工製作。

summary.en: Cloudstitch let developers power websites and apps with Google Spreadsheets.
summary.zh: Cloudstitch 讓開發者以 Google 試算表驅動網站與應用。

highlight.en: Born from MIT research, Cloudstitch connected web/mobile apps to ordinary spreadsheets with two-way sync; it was later acquired by Instabase.
highlight.zh: 源自 MIT 研究,Cloudstitch 將網頁與行動應用連接到一般試算表並雙向同步;後被 Instabase 收購。

summary.en: Saida was a bank account that lets you easily separate, spend, and track money.
summary.zh: Saida 是一個讓你輕鬆分類、消費與追蹤金錢的銀行帳戶。

highlight.en: Saida's account works like rooms in a house, giving users dedicated pockets of money within one account for different uses.
highlight.zh: Saida 的帳戶運作如同房子裡的不同房間,讓使用者在單一帳戶內為不同用途設置專屬的資金口袋。

summary.en: Convox provides open-source tools to deploy, manage, and monitor cloud apps.
summary.zh: Convox 提供開源工具,用於部署、管理與監控雲端應用。

highlight.en: Convox offers a development and deployment platform that lets teams deploy apps in their own account on the cloud provider of their choice.
highlight.zh: Convox 提供開發與部署平台,讓團隊能在自選雲端供應商的自有帳戶中部署應用。

summary.en: Serica was a commodities trading platform connecting investors to bitcoin-linked assets.
summary.zh: Serica 是一個將投資人連接至比特幣連動資產的大宗商品交易平台。

highlight.en: Serica let asset rights for gold, silver, platinum, and palladium be traded and stored on the Bitcoin blockchain via a decentralized custodian service.
highlight.zh: Serica 讓黃金、白銀、鉑金與鈀金的資產權利可透過去中心化保管服務在比特幣區塊鏈上交易與儲存。

summary.en: teaBOT is a robot that makes custom tea blends as an office amenity.
summary.zh: teaBOT 是一台製作客製化茶飲的機器人,作為辦公室設施。

highlight.en: teaBOT offers amenity-as-a-service to offices and showrooms like Google, HubSpot, and McKinsey, who use it as a recruiting and retention tool.
highlight.zh: teaBOT 為 Google、HubSpot、McKinsey 等辦公室與展示間提供設施即服務,他們將其用作招募與留才工具。

summary.en: Roomblocker was a hotel booking service for groups and events.
summary.zh: Roomblocker 是一個為團體與活動提供的飯店訂房服務。

highlight.en: Roomblocker focused on simplifying hotel room booking for groups and events.
highlight.zh: Roomblocker 專注於簡化團體與活動的飯店訂房流程。

summary.en: Vernox is production planning software for construction teams.
summary.zh: Vernox 是為營建團隊打造的生產規劃軟體。

highlight.en: Vernox lets construction teams coordinate work plans, identify look-ahead tasks, track and remove constraints, and update plans week to week.
highlight.zh: Vernox 讓營建團隊協調工作計畫、辨識前瞻任務、追蹤並排除限制,並逐週更新計畫。

summary.en: Airmada builds autonomous ground stations for drones.
summary.zh: Airmada 為無人機打造自動化地面站。

highlight.en: Founded out of MIT, Airmada's automated ground stations protect drones, swap their batteries, and launch missions for routine, on-demand autonomous operation.
highlight.zh: 由 MIT 衍生創立,Airmada 的自動化地面站可保護無人機、更換電池並啟動任務,實現例行與隨選的自主運作。

summary.en: Shotput developed AI and robotics to automate e-commerce logistics and fulfillment.
summary.zh: Shotput 開發 AI 與機器人技術,自動化電商物流與履約。

highlight.en: Shotput built software to ship products globally faster, helping companies determine shipping routes, understand demand, and reduce shipping and material costs.
highlight.zh: Shotput 打造軟體以更快地全球出貨,協助企業規劃運送路線、掌握需求,並降低運輸與材料成本。

summary.en: Stitch Health was a care coordination platform for healthcare teams.
summary.zh: Stitch Health 是為醫療團隊打造的照護協調平台。

highlight.en: Stitch Health provided care coordination and collaboration tools for healthcare teams.
highlight.zh: Stitch Health 為醫療團隊提供照護協調與協作工具。

summary.en: Bistrobot makes robots that make sandwiches.
summary.zh: Bistrobot 製造會做三明治的機器人。

highlight.en: Bistrobot's robots make sandwiches to serve good food fast with no long lines or wrong orders, while customers watch the robot prepare their lunch.
highlight.zh: Bistrobot 的機器人現做三明治,提供快速美食且無需排長隊、不會出錯,顧客還能看著機器人製作午餐。

summary.en: Appcanary tracked dependencies in apps and servers to flag vulnerabilities.
summary.zh: Appcanary 追蹤應用與伺服器中的相依套件,以標示安全漏洞。

highlight.en: Appcanary monitored servers and notified teams when their software dependencies needed updating, so they would never run vulnerable software.
highlight.zh: Appcanary 監控伺服器,並在軟體相依套件需要更新時通知團隊,確保不再執行有漏洞的軟體。

summary.en: Sphere Secure Workspace provided a secure workspace product for organizations.
summary.zh: Sphere Secure Workspace 為組織提供安全的工作空間產品。

highlight.en: Sphere Secure Workspace offered a secure workspace product available via demonstration and direct enquiry.
highlight.zh: Sphere Secure Workspace 提供安全工作空間產品,可透過產品展示與直接洽詢取得。

summary.en: zPREDICTA builds patient-derived 3D tissue models for preclinical drug testing.
summary.zh: zPREDICTA 打造源自病患的 3D 組織模型,用於臨床前藥物測試。

highlight.en: zPREDICTA's organ-specific 3D culture models reconstruct human tissues and preserve tumor-microenvironment interactions to predict clinical drug response.
highlight.zh: zPREDICTA 的器官特異性 3D 培養模型可重建人體組織並保留腫瘤與微環境的交互作用,以預測臨床藥物反應。

summary.en: jEugene highlights undefined terms and unused definitions in legal documents.
summary.zh: jEugene 在法律文件中標示未定義的詞彙與未使用的定義。

highlight.en: jEugene jumpstarts definitions checks by highlighting undefined terms and unused definitions in the text in seconds, freeing lawyers for harder problems.
highlight.zh: jEugene 能在數秒內於文本中標示未定義詞彙與未使用的定義,加速定義檢查,讓律師專注於更困難的問題。

summary.en: Prayas Analytics offered A/B testing for brick-and-mortar stores.
summary.zh: Prayas Analytics 為實體店面提供 A/B 測試。

highlight.en: Prayas let retailers A/B test their stores like e-commerce sites by collecting customer-movement data from existing security cameras, including for Barneys.
highlight.zh: Prayas 透過既有監視攝影機收集顧客動線數據,讓零售商能像電商網站一樣對門市進行 A/B 測試,合作對象包括 Barneys。

summary.en: Reduced Energy Microsystems builds the lowest-power silicon for embedded deep learning.
summary.zh: Reduced Energy Microsystems 打造用於嵌入式深度學習的最低功耗晶片。

highlight.en: REM pairs asynchronous resilient technology with a custom neural network architecture so its chips run inference in a tiny power envelope for AR and robots.
highlight.zh: REM 結合非同步韌性技術與客製化神經網路架構,讓晶片能在極低功耗下執行推論,服務擴增實境與機器人。

summary.en: Seva Coffee is a consumer electronics company making personalized cups of coffee.
summary.zh: Seva Coffee 是一家製作個人化咖啡的消費電子公司。

highlight.en: Seva Coffee, a consumer electronics company based in Madrid, set out to change the world of coffee one personalized cup at a time.
highlight.zh: Seva Coffee 是一家位於馬德里的消費電子公司,致力以一杯杯個人化咖啡改變咖啡世界。

summary.en: Shred Video builds automated systems that turn action footage into edited videos.
summary.zh: Shred Video 打造自動化系統,將動態影片轉為剪輯成片。

highlight.en: Shred Video reads a camera's acceleration to pinpoint action moments for surfers and skaters, then matches the best clips to a song's beat-drop.
highlight.zh: Shred Video 透過讀取攝影機的加速度,為衝浪與滑板玩家找出精彩時刻,再將最佳片段與歌曲的節奏高潮對齊。

summary.en: Halolife was an online platform to find and plan a burial or cremation service.
summary.zh: Halolife 是一個尋找與規劃土葬或火化服務的線上平台。

highlight.en: Halolife offered an end-of-life marketplace with full transparency of funeral and cremation provider reviews and prices, starting in California.
highlight.zh: Halolife 提供身後事市集,完整透明地呈現殯葬與火化業者的評價與價格,並從加州起步。

summary.en: Leaders In Tech is a leadership accelerator designed for startup founders.
summary.zh: Leaders In Tech 是專為新創創辦人設計的領導力加速器。

highlight.en: Leaders In Tech's 350+ alumni founders now run companies valued at over $75B, with endorsements from leaders at Twitch, Cruise, Lattice, and YC.
highlight.zh: Leaders In Tech 超過 350 位校友創辦人如今經營著估值逾 750 億美元的公司,並獲 Twitch、Cruise、Lattice 與 YC 領導者推薦。

summary.en: Leada offered online enterprise training in data science and analytics.
summary.zh: Leada 提供資料科學與分析的線上企業訓練。

highlight.en: Leada's program helped companies onboard employees in their own data, teaching them to answer business questions using BI tools, SQL, R, or Python.
highlight.zh: Leada 的計畫協助企業讓員工熟悉自家數據,教導他們運用 BI 工具、SQL、R 或 Python 回答商業問題。

summary.en: Traversal Networks built a network intrusion detection system to catch unknown threats.
summary.zh: Traversal Networks 打造可捕捉未知威脅的網路入侵偵測系統。

highlight.en: Traversal's analyst-assisted Lateral Threat Detector appliances learn traffic patterns and use reinforcement learning to detect backdoors, bots, and recon.
highlight.zh: Traversal 的分析師輔助型 Lateral Threat Detector 設備可學習流量模式,並運用強化學習偵測後門、殭屍程式與網路偵察。

summary.en: Klarismo turns your body into an interactive experience from MRI scans.
summary.zh: Klarismo 將 MRI 掃描轉化為身體的互動式體驗。

highlight.en: Klarismo's cloud-based software converts full-body MRI scans into annotated 3D models, using machine learning to measure body composition at scale.
highlight.zh: Klarismo 的雲端軟體將全身 MRI 掃描轉為附註解的 3D 模型,運用機器學習規模化測量身體組成。

summary.en: L. makes award-winning personal care products with organic materials.
summary.zh: L. 以有機材料製作屢獲殊榮的個人護理產品。

highlight.en: For every L. product sold, one is made accessible to a woman or girl who needs it; after 250M+ products in 20+ countries, L. was acquired by P&G in 2019.
highlight.zh: L. 每售出一件產品就讓一件提供給有需要的女性或女孩;在 20 多國提供逾 2.5 億件產品後,L. 於 2019 年被 P&G 收購。

summary.en: CareLedger helps companies save money on healthcare expenses.
summary.zh: CareLedger 協助企業節省醫療支出。

highlight.en: CareLedger provides pricing data on local high-value providers and motivates employees to spend less, helping employers cut healthcare spend by over 10%.
highlight.zh: CareLedger 提供當地高價值醫療提供者的價格數據並鼓勵員工減少支出,協助雇主將醫療支出降低逾 10%。

summary.en: Apollo Health was a Summer 2015 Y Combinator consumer health company.
summary.zh: Apollo Health 是 2015 年夏季 Y Combinator 的消費者健康公司。

highlight.en: Apollo Health was a consumer health company in Y Combinator's Summer 2015 batch; detailed product information is not available in the source.
highlight.zh: Apollo Health 是 Y Combinator 2015 年夏季梯隊的消費者健康公司;來源中未提供詳細的產品資訊。

summary.en: Ohm is a smart device so you never have to jump start your car again.
summary.zh: Ohm 是一款智慧裝置,讓你再也不必為汽車接電發動。

highlight.en: Ohm automatically shuts off when your battery gets critically low if you leave your lights on, then switches back on when you start the car.
highlight.zh: 若你忘記關車燈,Ohm 會在電池電量過低時自動斷電,並在你發動車輛時重新接通。

summary.en: Paribus was a consumer fintech service later associated with Ramp.
summary.zh: Paribus 是一項消費者金融科技服務,後與 Ramp 相關。

highlight.en: Paribus was a Summer 2015 fintech company; its website now redirects to Ramp, and no product detail is available in the source text.
highlight.zh: Paribus 是 2015 年夏季的金融科技公司;其網站現已轉向 Ramp,來源文字中未提供產品細節。

summary.en: Interviewed offered job simulations and assessments to see candidates in action.
summary.zh: Interviewed 提供工作模擬與評量,讓你看見求職者的實際表現。

highlight.en: Interviewed let employers see candidates do real job tasks via simulations and assessments; it was acquired by Indeed, the world's number one job site.
highlight.zh: Interviewed 透過模擬與評量讓雇主看見求職者執行實際工作任務的表現;該公司被全球第一大求職網站 Indeed 收購。

summary.en: Auro Robotics builds autonomous shuttles for campus-like environments.
summary.zh: Auro Robotics 為類校園環境打造自動駕駛接駁車。

highlight.en: Auro Robotics develops self-driving shuttles for transportation within campuses such as universities, resorts, airports, and retirement communities.
highlight.zh: Auro Robotics 開發自動駕駛接駁車,用於大學、度假村、機場與退休社區等校園型環境內的運輸。

summary.en: Tovala is a smart-oven-paired subscription meal service.
summary.zh: Tovala 是一項搭配智慧烤箱的訂閱式餐點服務。

highlight.en: Tovala is a Chicago-based food-tech company pairing a smart oven with a weekly meal delivery service.
highlight.zh: Tovala 是一家總部位於芝加哥的食品科技公司,將智慧烤箱與每週餐點外送服務結合。

summary.en: Opentrons makes pipetting robots for biologists.
summary.zh: Opentrons 為生物學家製造移液機器人。

highlight.en: Opentrons' robots automate pipetting and benchwork, freeing biologists from repetitive tasks and providing a common platform to share protocols.
highlight.zh: Opentrons 的機器人自動化移液與實驗檯工作,讓生物學家免於重複性勞動,並提供共用平台以分享實驗流程。

summary.en: Function of Beauty offers customizable hair, skin, and body care products.
summary.zh: Function of Beauty 提供可客製化的護髮、護膚與身體護理產品。

highlight.en: Function of Beauty sits at the intersection of tech and beauty, aiming to democratize custom beauty with a no-one-size-fits-all approach to personal care.
highlight.zh: Function of Beauty 位於科技與美妝的交會點,以「沒有一體適用」的個人護理理念,致力讓客製化美妝普及大眾。

summary.en: Sendbird is an AI agent platform for customer communication that aims to delight, not just support.
summary.zh: Sendbird 是一個客戶溝通的 AI 代理平台,目標是讓客戶愉悅而非僅止於支援。

highlight.en: Sendbird powers over 300M people's conversations monthly for customers like DoorDash, Match Group, PayPal, and Walgreens, and has raised over $220M.
highlight.zh: Sendbird 每月為 DoorDash、Match Group、PayPal 與 Walgreens 等客戶驅動超過 3 億人的對話,並已募資逾 2.2 億美元。

summary.en: Luciq (formerly Instabug) is an agentic observability platform for mobile apps.
summary.zh: Luciq(前身為 Instabug)是一個面向行動應用的代理式可觀測性平台。

highlight.en: Luciq's AI agents detect, prioritize, and resolve issues across the app lifecycle, helping teams ship faster and deliver frustration-free user sessions.
highlight.zh: Luciq 的 AI 代理可在應用程式生命週期中偵測、排序並解決問題,協助團隊更快發布並提供無挫折的使用者體驗。

summary.en: Gecko Robotics combines AI and robotics for the built world's critical infrastructure.
summary.zh: Gecko Robotics 結合 AI 與機器人技術,服務人造世界的關鍵基礎設施。

highlight.en: Gecko uses fixed sensors and robots that climb, crawl, swim, and fly, fusing data with AI in its Cantilever platform as a single source of truth for assets.
highlight.zh: Gecko 運用固定感測器與能攀爬、爬行、游泳與飛行的機器人,在 Cantilever 平台融合數據與 AI,作為基礎設施的單一可信來源。

summary.en: Boom Supersonic is building economically and environmentally sustainable supersonic air travel.
summary.zh: Boom Supersonic 正打造兼具經濟與環境永續的超音速航空旅行。

highlight.en: Boom's Overture airliner flies at twice today's speed on 100% sustainable aviation fuel, with 130 aircraft ordered by American, United, and Japan Airlines.
highlight.zh: Boom 的 Overture 客機以 100% 永續航空燃料飛行,速度達今日兩倍,並已獲美國、聯合與日本航空合計 130 架訂單。

summary.en: GetAccept is a digital sales room platform to help close deals faster.
summary.zh: GetAccept 是一個數位銷售室平台,協助更快地完成交易。

highlight.en: GetAccept combines personalized video, live chat, and e-signature for remote selling, and says it is used in over 50 countries as a fast-growing SaaS company.
highlight.zh: GetAccept 整合個人化影片、即時聊天與電子簽章用於遠端銷售,並表示其作為快速成長的 SaaS 公司已在超過 50 個國家使用。

summary.en: Salt Security protects organizations from breaches through their APIs.
summary.zh: Salt Security 保護組織免於透過其 API 遭到入侵。

highlight.en: Salt's patented API Protection Platform combines cloud-scale big data with ML/AI, correlating activity across millions of APIs and users to prevent attacks.
highlight.zh: Salt 的專利 API 防護平台結合雲端級大數據與機器學習 / AI,跨數百萬個 API 與使用者關聯活動以阻止攻擊。

summary.en: Focal Systems builds an operating system for brick-and-mortar retail using deep learning.
summary.zh: Focal Systems 運用深度學習,為實體零售打造一套作業系統。

highlight.en: Focal digitizes store shelves hourly and runs FocalOS so retailers unlock operational efficiencies, optimized merchandising, and streamlined supply chains.
highlight.zh: Focal 每小時數位化貨架並運行 FocalOS,讓零售商實現營運效率、優化商品陳列並精簡供應鏈。

summary.en: Daily provides conversational voice and multimodal AI built with open source.
summary.zh: Daily 提供以開源打造的對話式語音與多模態 AI。

highlight.en: Daily's cross-platform SDKs and global infrastructure give developers ultra-low-latency voice, video, and AI for building real-time voice and video agents.
highlight.zh: Daily 的跨平台 SDK 與全球基礎設施為開發者提供超低延遲的語音、視訊與 AI,用以打造即時語音與視訊代理。

summary.en: Deepgram builds foundational AI for speech transcription and understanding.
summary.zh: Deepgram 打造用於語音轉錄與理解的基礎 AI。

highlight.en: Deepgram gives developers API access to fast, accurate transcription with features like summarization and sentiment analysis across dozens of languages.
highlight.zh: Deepgram 讓開發者透過 API 取得快速且精準的轉錄,並支援數十種語言的摘要與情緒分析等功能。

summary.en: Outschool is a live online learning platform empowering kids ages 3–18.
summary.zh: Outschool 是一個賦能 3 至 18 歲孩童的即時線上學習平台。

highlight.en: Outschool offers more than 140,000 live online classes via interactive video to over 1,000,000 learners in 183 countries, taught by independent educators.
highlight.zh: Outschool 由獨立教師透過互動式視訊提供超過 14 萬堂即時線上課程,服務 183 個國家逾 100 萬名學習者。

summary.en: Mux provides video infrastructure for developers.
summary.zh: Mux 為開發者提供影音基礎設施。

highlight.en: Mux offers two API-first products—Mux Video for streaming and Mux Data for analytics—handling encoding, storage, and delivery while optimizing for every device.
highlight.zh: Mux 提供兩款 API 優先產品——用於串流的 Mux Video 與用於分析的 Mux Data——負責編碼、儲存與傳輸,並為各種裝置優化。

summary.en: Bus.com was the easiest way to charter a bus in North America.
summary.zh: Bus.com 曾是北美最簡便的包車服務。

highlight.en: Bus.com's web app removed the friction of group travel, making it easy to organize, book, join, and enjoy bus trips to events and experiences.
highlight.zh: Bus.com 的網頁應用消除團體旅行的摩擦,讓人輕鬆籌劃、預訂、加入並享受前往活動與體驗的巴士行程。

summary.en: Inevitable Tech aims to make food a renewable resource for everyone.
summary.zh: Inevitable Tech 致力讓食物成為人人可得的可再生資源。

highlight.en: Linked to Iron Ox, Inevitable Tech redesigns agriculture into a precise science to confront farming's environmental impacts and unlock plants' full potential.
highlight.zh: 與 Iron Ox 相關的 Inevitable Tech 將農業重新設計為一門精確科學,以因應耕作的環境衝擊並讓作物充分發揮潛力。

summary.en: Kisan Network is a tech-enabled, fully integrated pan-India agri produce supply chain.
summary.zh: Kisan Network 是一個科技賦能、全面整合的全印度農產品供應鏈。

highlight.en: Kisan Network connects small farmers directly to businesses with every step digitally tracked, helping farmers earn 10% more than market prices with zero paper.
highlight.zh: Kisan Network 將小農直接連結至企業,每一步皆數位化追蹤,協助農民賺取高於市價 10% 的收入,且全程零紙張。

summary.en: Mason is the fastest way to take smart devices from idea to end user.
summary.zh: Mason 是讓智慧裝置從構想到觸及終端使用者最快的方式。

highlight.en: Mason's fully managed Smart Device Platform handles all backend services with usage-based pricing, making software delivery on a product line cloud-simple.
highlight.zh: Mason 全託管的智慧裝置平台以用量計費處理所有後端服務,讓在智慧產品線上交付軟體如同部署雲端應用般簡單。

summary.en: FightCamp is a home boxing gym with motion trackers that count punches and reps.
summary.zh: FightCamp 是一座配備動作追蹤器、可計算出拳與次數的居家拳擊健身房。

highlight.en: FightCamp combines world-class boxing trainers, studio-quality equipment, and Punch Tracking technology that measures every strike and delivers real-time stats.
highlight.zh: FightCamp 結合世界級拳擊教練、媲美工作室的器材,以及可測量每一拳並即時回傳數據的出拳追蹤技術。
